title: ericameria parryi var. latior
intro: Ericameria parryi var. latior, also known as Parry's goldenrod or Pinyon bush goldenrod, is a plant species within the sunflower family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ericameria parryi var. latior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may be found in tea form, infusions, or dried extracts, often used to support immune function and address various health concerns.
